input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.5.1
            TITLE: one or more team members will give the presentation to the judges.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.5.1: One or more team members will give the presentation to the judges.
S.2.5.1 One or more team members will give the presentation to the judges.

final_answer: One or more team members will give the presentation to the judges.
